message:
🌱 Add wasmcloud: [FEATURE] wash up should have a flag to specify a NATS server config mission (#1013)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "wasmcloud-1405-feature-wash-up-should-have-a-flag-to-specify-a-nats-server-confi",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "wasmcloud: [FEATURE] `wash up` should have a flag to specify a NATS server config",
+    "description": "[FEATURE] `wash up` should have a flag to specify a NATS server config. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current wasmcloud deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your wasmcloud version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nhelm list -n wasmcloud 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working wasmcloud installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review wasmcloud configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant wasmcloud configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get configmap -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=wasmcloud\n```\n### Affected project(s)\n\n- [X] wasmCloud CLI (wash)\n\n### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [FEATURE] `wash up` should have a flag to specify a NATS\u2026",
+        "description": "## Related Issues\r\n## Release Information\nNext\n\n## Consumer Impact\n\n## Testing\n\n### Unit Test(s)\n\n### Acceptance or Integration\n\n### Manual Verification\nran `cargo run -- up --nats-config-file ~/Desktop/Wasm/special.conf --nats-host=\"127.0.0.1\" --nats-port=4959` which executed as expected and also\n```yaml\n\u279c wash up --help | grep nats\n      --nats-credsfile <NATS_CREDSFILE>\n      --nats-remote-url <NATS_REMOTE_URL>\n      --nats-connect-only\n      --nats-version <NATS_VERSION>\n          NATS server version to download, e.g. `v2.10.7`. See https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/releases/ for releases [en\nv: NATS_VERSION=] [default: v2.10.7]\n      --nats-host <NATS_HOST>\n      --nats-port <NATS_PORT>\n          NATS server port to connect to. This will be used as the NATS listen port if `--nats-connect-only` isn't set [env: WAS\nMCLOUD_NATS_PORT=]\n      --nats-websocket-port <NATS_WEBSOCKET_PORT>\n   \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get events -n wasmcloud --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[FEATURE] `wash up` should have a flag to specify a NATS\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Related Issues\r\n## Release Information\nNext\n\n## Consumer Impact\n\n## Testing\n\n### Unit Test(s)\n\n### Acceptance or Integration\n\n### Manual Verification\nran `cargo run -- up --nats-config-file ~/Desktop/Wasm/special.conf --nats-host=\"127.0.0.1\" --nats-port=4959` which executed as expected and also exited normally by `cargo run -- down -- all` stopping all components successfully\n\nverified all",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "\u279c wash up --help | grep nats\n      --nats-credsfile <NATS_CREDSFILE>\n      --nats-remote-url <NATS_REMOTE_URL>\n      --nats-connect-only\n      --nats-version <NATS_VERSION>\n          NATS server version to download, e.g. `v2.10.7`. See https://github.com/nats-io/nats-server/releases/ for releases [en\nv: NATS_VERSION=] [default: v2.10.7]\n      --nats-host <NATS_HOST>\n      --nats-port <NATS_PORT>\n          NATS server port to connect to. This will be used as the NATS listen port if `--nats-connect-only` isn't set [env: WAS\nMCLOUD_NATS_PORT=]\n      --nats-websocket-port <NATS_WEBSOCKET_PORT>\n      --nats-js-domain <NATS_JS_DOMAIN>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "wasmcloud",
+      "incubating",
+      "runtime",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "wasmcloud"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/wasmCloud/wasmCloud/issues/1405",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/wasmCloud/wasmCloud",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/wasmCloud/wasmCloud/pull/2271"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "wash"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with wasmcloud installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:27:13.143Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
